headline: Commerce finding on van imports may give relief to beleaguered Wabash
summary: Wabash National had its debt rating downgraded by S&P but scored a major victory at the Commerce department. The post Commerce finding on van imports may give relief to beleaguered Wabash appeared first on FreightWaves.

headline: S&P Global Ratings affirmed the BBB/A-2 credit rating and maintained the negative outlook for Oma Savings Bank Plc
summary: OMA SAVINGS BANK PLC STOCK EXCHANGE RELEASE 10 JUNE 2026 AT 20.45 EEST, OTHER INFORMATION DISCLOSED ACCORDING TO THE RULES OF THE EXCHANGE S&P Global Ratings affirmed the BBB/A-2 credit rating and maintained the negative outlook for Oma Savings Bank Plc On 10 June 2026, S&P Global Ratings (S&P) has affirmed that the short-term and long-term issuer credit ratings of Oma Savings Bank Plc (OmaSp or the Company) remain unchanged and are BBB/A-2. headline: CARFAX: Top 10 Vehicles Targeted by Recent Catalytic Converters Thefts
summary: New CARFAX data estimates more than 137,000 catalytic converters were stolen in 2025, with thousands more estimated stolen at the start of this year. Law enforcement warns thieves target these emission-control devices to get at the valuable precious metals they contain, including platinum, palladium and rhodium.

headline: Wall Street Braces for SpaceX With Stress Test, ‘Watch Parties’
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Wall Street has spent months debating how much SpaceX is worth.
